message:
chore: apply rustfmt to anti_entropy, verifier_sdk, and artifact_signing

Reflow long lines in anti_entropy.rs (epoch-tolerance comparison),
verifier_sdk.rs (deterministic_hash_fields call and assertion), and
artifact_signing.rs (parse_canonical test assertions) to comply with
the project line-length limit. No logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
